name: Chloe Oh
bio: Hi everyone! My name is Chloe and I am a fourth-year Marketing student! In my spare time, I love to check out new restaurants in Vancouver (certified foodie), trying out new workout classes, and cooking! If you see me around, feel free to stop by and say hi!!

name: Ryan Liu
bio: Hey! I'm Ryan, a second-year Sauder student intending to specialize in Marketing! I love eating good food, working out, playing guitar, poker, basketball, and watching shows when I have an exam the next day. I'm always excited to meet new people so don't hesitate to reach out :)

name: Madison Lee
bio: Hiii I'm Maddy, a third-year marketing student. When I'm not deep into a k-drama binge, you'll probably catch me hunting down the latest foodie trends or vlogging like a wannabe influencer. Always down to chat over something sweet (especially if it's got pearls)! <3

name: Vanessa Kwan
bio: Hi there! I'm Vanessa, a fourth-year UBC Sauder student specializing in Marketing and aiming to complete a concentration in Business Analytics. In my spare time, you'll find me running with my mini-aussie at the beach, baking a sweet treat or rotting on the couch watching Netflix. I'm always open to chatting so please feel free to reach out!

name: Ara Kwon
bio: Hi! My name is Ara and I'm a 4th year Marketing + BTM student. I'm passionate about fashion, music, sunsets, and binge watching throwback movies! I'm also a huge foodie and love to explore different eats around the city with my friends. Feel free to message me for a chat!

name: Priya Sidhu
bio: Hi everyone! My name is Priya, and I am a 5th-year student specialising in Marketing with a concentration in Sustainability and Social Impact. I love travelling by plane or car since my family has an RV. Recently, I have been addicted to Paint by Numbers, and they are covering my entire room. If you ever see me, please stop and say hi :)

name: Gia Khanna
bio: Hi! I'm Gia and I'm a 4th year Marketing and Business Analytics student at UBC Sauder. In my spare time, I love trying new restaurants, bingeing a good show or movie (Ciniplex is one of my favourite places), and discovering new music! I'm always open to chatting, so please feel free to reach out :)

name: Neal Sian
bio: Hi! I'm Neal, a third-year student at Sauder. When I'm not studying, I love spending time with friends and family, and I'm especially passionate about playing sports, soccer being my favorite! I'm always on the hunt for new music, so feel free to send me your top recommendations!

name: Sakura Gibson
bio: Hi! I'm Sakura, a 4th year Sauder student specializing in Marketing with a concentration in Business Analytics. In my spare time, you'll find me making spotify playlists, trying new restaurants, or binging true crime tv series. I'm also always looking for new cafes, so if you know any hidden gems or just want to chat over a latte, I'm in!

name: Susie Lee
bio: Hey! My name is Susie, a 5th year Sauder student specialized in Marketing :) I love spending time outside, whether it's playing pickle ball or rotting on the beach. If you know me, you know I will also never say no to a sweet treat… EVER. I love to yap, so feel free to reach out!

name: Angela Liu
bio: Hello! My name is Angela, a 3rd year Marketing student at Sauder. In my free time I love exploring restaurants, running, updating Spotify playlists or reading a good book. I'm always on the hunt for hidden gems so feel free to reach out and share your faves!

name: Joseph Yoon
bio: Hi! My name is Joseph, a second-year Arts student. In my free time, I love eating, working out, listening to music, or hanging out with friends! I'm always down to try new things, meet new people, and have fun, so feel free to reach out anytime! :)

name: Geonwoo Park
bio: Nice to meet you :) my name is Geon and I'm in my 5th year studying Marketing and BTM. When you do see me I'll be grinding away (really im on reels) in the CLC OR playing basketball in between classes. Please stop by and say hi if you luv marketing

name: Jenna Tuazon
bio: Heyy! I'm Jenna, a second-year Sauder student intending to specialize in Marketing! In my free time, I love going on adventures with my friends, trying new foods, and hunting for hidden finds around Vancouver. I'm all about fashion and design, and there's nothing better than listening to music while watching the sunset. Reach out, and we can chat over matcha :) Let's be friends!!

name: Ariana Zhassuzak
bio: Hi! I'm Ariana and I'm a 3rd year at Sauder. In my free time I love working out, reading books (mystery thrillers are my fave), and trying the almond croissants from new cafes.

name: Emily Cheng
bio: Hi! I'm Emily, a fourth-year UBC Sauder student specializing in Marketing with a concentration in Business Analytics. In my free time, I love listening to music, playing board games, watching hockey, and exploring different restaurants with friends. I'm always happy to meet new people so feel free to reach out!

name: Jay Han
bio: Hi I'm Jay and I'm in my third-year at Sauder! If you don't see me in class or at the CLC, I'm probably working on a case, grabbing food with friends, playing music or rotting in bed binge-watching K-dramas! I love meeting new people so feel free to reach out. :)

name: Michelle Liang
bio: Hello Everyone!!! I'm Michelle and currently in my 5th year at UBC (yeah I'm old). I am currently completing my marketing and BA degree, and in my free time, I've been obsessed with bouldering and also love to try out new restaurants in vancouver:)

name: Kyle Gomez
bio: Hi, I'm Kyle, a 4th year at UBC Sauder specializing in Global Supply Chain and Logistics Management. I like playing badminton, volleyball, and working out.

name: Caleb Chang
bio: Hi, I'm Caleb and I'm in my 6th year (yes.. 6th year) studying Media Studies at UBC. In my free time, I love to play all kinds of sports (basketball, volleyball, golf) and plan itineraries for trips 2 years in advance (they never happen). I love all things marketing- reach out if you ever want to connect :)

name: Carter Van Unen
bio: Hi, I'm Carter, a third-year finance student at UBC Sauder. In my free time, you can find me out biking, hiking, and exploring Vancouver, or combing through Spotify to find some new music to listen to. Feel free to reach out and connect!

name: David Chen
bio: Hi, I'm David and I'm in my 3rd year studying international economics at UBC. In my free time, I play all kinds of sports and eat what I have not eaten. I love to try new things and meet new people. Feel free to reach out!

name: Michelle Pinero
bio: Hola! I'm Michelle, a second-year student specializing in Marketing with a Psych minor. You'll usually find me scouting out cafés, front row at concerts with friends, or capturing life's little moments through photos. I love making memories – so I'm always down for a volleyball game, spontaneous side quest, or a good chat :)

name: Nathan Law
bio: Hey! I'm Nathan, a second-year Sauder student intending to specialize in marketing and BTM. I love going to the gym, playing fingerstyle guitar, discovering new music, and creating graphic designs! You'll probably see me attending random events on campus or studying at the CLC. If you're down, let's chat sometime!

name: Jace Lee
bio: Hey! I'm Jace, a second-year student at Sauder! When I'm not pretending to study, I'm usually spending time with friends, meeting new people or sleeping in a little too much… Anyways, I'm always up for a good conversation (especially anything tech related), so don't hesitate to reach out!

name: Adeline Chan
bio: Hi! I'm Adeline, a third-year Sauder student specializing in Marketing with a concentration in Business Analytics. In my spare time, I love to try out new restaurants, join a pilates class, or go hiking! I am always down for a chat so don't hesitate to reach out!

name: Samantha Lobo
bio: Hi! I'm Samantha, a third-year Marketing student at Sauder. In my spare time, you can find me watching the newest K-dramas, debriefing with friends, or on the hunt to find the best matcha. I love meeting new people, so feel free to reach out :)

name: Mai Buree
bio: Hi! My name is Mai, and I am in my second year at UBC Sauder. I love all things art, especially fashion and photography! In my free time, you can catch me roaming around with my film camera, doing random side quests that usually involve food, or just yapping away - so feel free to reach out :)

name: Janaye Cheong
bio: Hello! :) I'm Janaye, a fourth-year Cognitive Systems student with a passion for data and computer science. I can usually be found at the climbing gym, going for walks around Kits, or cafe hopping through Van. I love a good yap session, so feel free to reach out!

name: Jayden Tsai
bio: Hey, I'm Jayden, in my second year at Sauder! I'm super into cars (especially German - Mercedes on top), and I'm a huge Lakers fan. In my free time, I enjoy going to the gym, going out, and sim-racing! Feel free to reach out anytime!

name: Mandy Chen
bio: Hi there! My name is Mandy, a second year student at UBC Sauder with an intended specialization in Marketing + BTM! I love trying new cafes, playing with my pet dog (a samsky), and card games! If you see me around, please stop by and say hello :)

name: Daniel Lee
bio: Hi I'm Daniel, a third year bucs student. My go-to chill activities are good eats, reading, thrifting while listening to music, and light hoop seshes. But I also love trying new things (currently doing more granola stuff). If any of that sounds like your vibe, hit me up, always down for a good convo.

name: Kevin Gu
bio: Hi I'm Kevin, an incoming 5th year BUCS student @ Sauder! I love training Muay Thai and playing sports like ultimate, swimming, and tennis! Favourite show is the Fresh Prince of Bel Air and favourite movie series is Rush Hour. So good to meet everyone!

name: Ethan Hansen
bio: Hey! I'm Ethan, a 6th (don't ask) year BUCS student. When I'm not busy with work, I enjoy cooking, listening to new music, and going for hikes. I'm always open to chatting so feel free to connect!

name: Emily Liu
bio: Hi! I’m Emily, a fourth-year Marketing student with a passion in graphic design. Outside of class, I love spending time with my friends, grabbing bubble tea, and building puzzles. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or just want to chat!
